failure_modes.text: Blind spots persist when people resist the outside view because the feedback threatens ego or self-image.
failure_modes.mitigation: Protect the feedback channel from ego defense: blind spots persist when the outside view is resisted because it threatens self-image.

failure_modes.text: Teams can mistake fluency with reflection language for actual self-knowledge and calibration.
failure_modes.mitigation: Test self-knowledge claims with behavioral evidence; fluency with reflection language is not the same as actual calibration.

failure_modes.text: The process collapses when feedback and disclosure are too generic, socially safe, or judgmental to reduce the real blind spot.
failure_modes.source_quote: The tool requires specific, honest input.
failure_modes.mitigation: Make feedback concrete, specific, and behaviorally grounded; generic or socially safe exchanges do not reduce the real blind spot.

premortem_questions.text: What do others know about our situation that we are refusing to acknowledge?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What do others know about our situation that we are refusing to acknowledge?

premortem_questions.text: What evidence outside our own team would unambiguously resolve this issue?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What evidence, external to our team, would unambiguously resolve this issue?

premortem_questions.text: If we failed, what assumptions about our team dynamics or external environment were proven false?
premortem_questions.source_quote: If we failed, what specific assumptions about our external environment/team dynamics were proven false?

heuristics.text: Seek descriptive feedback that reveals how others see your actions instead of asking only for abstract approval.
heuristics.source_quote: The act of receiving feedback is emphasized as a vital process in cooperation.

heuristics.text: Use self-disclosure to increase transparency where it will actually improve cooperation rather than just image management.
Combine feedback uptake with calibration methods so reflection translates into better judgment rather than more self-storytelling.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on blind-spot reduction, specific feedback, and disclosure that improves calibration rather than on vague openness.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor self-awareness sprawl beyond the raw source's clearer feedback, disclosure, and anti-illusion-of-knowing material.
open_questions: The third heuristic compresses the source's feedback, calibration, and Feynman-style gap finding into one reusable operational move.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on perspective-taking, outside-view, and feynman-technique.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strongest on blind-spot barrier, ego barrier, and confirmation-bias style filtering.
structured_tensions: The source contains an explicit structured tension block naming active-listening and confirmation-bias.
